name: Reachfaster
source: reachfaster.ai (site fetch); LinkedIn (founder Robert Sieh based in NY)
notes: ReachFaster is an AI-powered Google Shopping Ads / ecommerce catalog optimization tool. No HQ city listed on site. Founder Robert Sieh LinkedIn location suggests New York; low confidence on city.

name: Duke
source: duke.edu; multiple sources confirm Durham, NC
notes: Duke University — private research university at 2080 Duke University Road, Durham, NC 27708.

name: Outsetshop
source: web search; outsetshop.com redirects to outsetstyle.com
notes: Domain outsetshop.com redirects to outsetstyle.com, a fashion/apparel ecommerce brand. HQ location not found in any public source. UK-registered 'Outset Clothing Limited' may be related but unconfirmed.

name: Insightscompany
notes: insightscompany.io is the domain for Persona by The Insights Company — an AI-moderated market research/qualitative interview platform. HQ listed as 169 Madison Ave, Ste 2951, New York, NY 10016 on Greenbook.

name: Headline
notes: Headline (formerly e.ventures) is a global VC firm HQ'd in San Francisco with additional offices in Berlin, Paris, London, Tokyo, Taipei, and São Paulo.

name: Meet Offsite
source: web search; related domain gooffsite.com shows NYC address (52 W 39th St)
notes: meetoffsite.com returns 404; likely a corporate offsite/retreat planning platform. Closely associated with OFFSITE NYC (gooffsite.com) at 52 West 39th Street, New York, NY. Low confidence on exact company identity.

name: Offe
notes: Off-price apparel/home goods marketplace selling excess inventory from ~75 brands. Founded 2019, based in Los Angeles. Also has a warehouse in Tennessee.

name: Alloy Automation
notes: All fields already populated; echoed unchanged.

name: Easyaudit
notes: EasyAudit is an AI-powered SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance automation platform headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Foreign HQ — city/state left null.

name: Fort Health
notes: Fort Health provides pediatric and adolescent mental health telehealth services (ages 4-24). HQ at 85 5th Ave Fl 8, New York, NY 10003. Raised $16M total.

name: Openai
notes: OpenAI, the AI research and products company. HQ at 1455 3rd Street, San Francisco, CA.

name: Hello Recess
notes: Recess (branded as Hello Recess) is a kids' activities marketplace connecting parents with enrichment classes, camps, and after-school programs. Founded by Amy Kiska and Molly Morse. First launched in Austin, TX; expanded to Dallas and Houston. Backed by $4M+. HQ assumed Austin based on founding/launch city.
